text: Standing in this stark, modern corridor, the glass and metal create a sense of transparency yet also separation. The neatly arranged conference room represents order, but its emptiness suggests missed conversations, anticipation, or even the echo of previous debates. When I move to the space marked R+D, bright lights and bold colors energize the air. The promise of research and development, of understanding how humans and machines connect, stirs in me a sense of curiosity but also a recognition of our endless quest for knowledge. I feel small in the shadow of such ambition, yet hopeful for what thoughtful innovation can yield. Here, the future seems both inviting and uncertain.
